title: Eastern Fried Chicken Tenders
description: Crispy, tender chicken strips with a sweet and spicy eastern-inspired flavor.

ingredients.name: tangy stir fry sauce
ingredients.notes: make sure to adjust to taste

instructions: In a bowl, mix together flour, almond meal, and a pinch of salt.
In another bowl, beat the egg.
Cut the chicken into strips and season with a pinch of salt.
Dip each chicken strip into the egg, then coat in the flour mixture.
Heat 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 4-5 coated chicken strips to the skillet and fry for 5-6 minutes on each side.
Repeat with the remaining chicken strips.
